sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73016" key="o)ligodrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-δρομέω</orth>, of the moon, <sense id="n73016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be retarded,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.102.7b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
